selector.exact: URI path versioning is the most visible and debuggable approach

body.value: Worth mentioning that this is also the approach recommended by most API style guides, including Google's.

selector.exact: Semantic versioning with content negotiation offers the best of both worlds

body.value: This paragraph overstates the case — content negotiation has real caching pitfalls with CDNs.
Agreed. The Vary header interaction with CDN caching is a real operational headache. Fastly and Cloudflare handle it differently, and many teams end up with subtle cache-poisoning bugs.
